notes: Executive characters chosen at the start of a new run. The player is offered 3 of these 7 (drawn with the run seed) and must pick one, so the same executive is not always available. Each executive applies a persistent, run-long set of effects. Fields per executive: id, name, title, desc, effects{ start_budget_delta:int, budget_per_season:int, target_mult:float (multiplies every view quota; <1 is easier, >1 harder), reroll_cost_mult:float, passive_mods{ view_mult:float, upkeep_mult:float, income_flat:number (added per live show each season), genre_view_mult:{GENRE:float} } }. passive_mods share the exact shape of seasonal modifiers and are merged into the same yield pipeline, so they always apply (independent of seasonal events). Every executive pairs a clearly-above-normal bonus with a real downside.

executives.name: Lorne Castellano
executives.title: The Mogul
executives.desc: A cigar-chewing media baron who buys his way to the top. Starts flush with cash (+$120) and skims +$12 from every season — but he greenlights for profit, not quality, so everything he touches loses a little shine (Views x0.95).

executives.name: Margot Devereux
executives.title: The Auteur
executives.desc: An award-hungry visionary obsessed with prestige. DRAMA and SCIFI soar under her eye (Views x1.30 each) — but her perfectionism is ruinously expensive (all upkeep x1.20).

executives.name: Dev Okonkwo
executives.title: The Showrunner
executives.desc: A hands-on craftsman who makes every show better across the board (Views x1.12). The catch: he was hired on a shoestring and you start $50 in the hole on your opening budget.

executives.name: Prudence Vale
executives.title: The Accountant
executives.desc: A ruthless cost-cutter. Slashes all upkeep (x0.82) and squeezes +$5 income from every live show each season — but her penny-pinching saps ambition, dulling audience numbers (Views x0.93).

executives.name: Buck Rawlins
executives.title: The Populist
executives.desc: Gives the people what they want: spectacle. REALITY and SPORTS dominate (Views x1.35 each) — but he has no patience for highbrow fare, and DRAMA and SCIFI wither under him (Views x0.78 each).

executives.name: Iris Chen
executives.title: The Visionary
executives.desc: Plays the long game and demands the impossible. Audience quotas are 18% steeper every season — but her swing-for-the-fences slate has a colossal ceiling (Views x1.28) and she reinvests +$8 a season.

executives.name: Sal Moretti
executives.title: The Closer
executives.desc: A deal-maker who keeps the network's expectations low and the war chest full: quotas are 15% gentler and you start with +$60. But his shows are pure filler with no monetisation muscle (-$4 income per live show each season).
